properties.description: Detects when a user reclassifies a document with a lower sensitivity label (potential label downgrade / exfiltration prep). Requires the Office 365 connector for OfficeActivity.
properties.query:
union isfuzzy=true OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| extend Operation = tostring(column_ifexists('Operation', ''))
| extend SensitivityLabelEventData = tostring(column_ifexists('SensitivityLabelEventData', ''))
| where Operation in ('SensitivityLabelApplied','SensitivityLabelChanged','SensitivityLabelRemoved')
| where isnotempty(SensitivityLabelEventData)
| extend evt = parse_json(SensitivityLabelEventData)
| extend OldLabelId = tostring(evt.OldSensitivityLabelId), NewLabelId = tostring(evt.SensitivityLabelId)
| where Operation == 'SensitivityLabelRemoved' or (isnotempty(OldLabelId) and OldLabelId != NewLabelId)
| extend UserId = tostring(column_ifexists('UserId', ''))
| extend OfficeObjectId = tostring(column_ifexists('OfficeObjectId', ''))
| extend ClientIP = tostring(column_ifexists('ClientIP', ''))
| project TimeGenerated, UserId, Operation, OfficeObjectId, OldLabelId, NewLabelId, ClientIP
